# JugueteSTEM.es — LLMs.txt

## Site Description

JugueteSTEM.es is a Spanish affiliate blog and toy review site targeting Spanish parents looking to buy educational and STEM toys for their children on Amazon. Published by Mkt Web 360 SLU (CIF B87679304).

## Main Topics

- Montessori toys and wooden educational materials
- STEM kits: science, robotics, and programming for children
- Educational board games and family games
- Construction toys: LEGO, Playmobil, magnetic sets
- Educational books and visual encyclopedias for children
- Buying guides for parents by age group

## Content Index

### Store Pages
- /tienda — Main store with all toy categories
- /tienda/juguetes-montessori — Montessori wooden toys
- /tienda/juguetes-stem — STEM science and robotics kits
- /tienda/juegos-mesa-educativos — Educational board games
- /tienda/construccion-lego — LEGO, Playmobil and magnetic construction
- /tienda/libros-educativos — Educational books and encyclopedias

### Featured Products
- /tienda/juguetes-montessori/hape-torre-colores-montessori — Hape stacking tower (best seller)
- /tienda/juguetes-stem/lego-boost-programacion — LEGO Boost robotics kit
- /tienda/juguetes-stem/thames-kosmos-quimica-junior — Thames & Kosmos chemistry set
- /tienda/juegos-mesa-educativos/dixit-juego-mesa — Dixit board game
- /tienda/construccion-lego/lego-classic-caja-creativa — LEGO Classic large box
- /tienda/libros-educativos/donde-esta-wally-coleccion — Where's Wally complete collection

### Blog Posts
- /blog/mejores-juguetes-montessori-3-anos — Best Montessori toys for 3-year-olds 2025
- /blog/juguetes-stem-ninos-8-anos — Best STEM toys for 8-12 year olds
- /blog/mejores-juegos-mesa-familia — 10 best family board games 2025
- /blog/lego-vs-playmobil-cual-elegir — LEGO vs Playmobil: which to choose
- /blog/como-elegir-juguete-educativo — How to choose a truly educational toy
- /blog/juguetes-regalo-navidad-ninos — Best Christmas gift toys 2025 by age
- /blog/introduccion-programacion-ninos — How to introduce coding to kids
- /blog/beneficios-juego-libre-montessori — Benefits of free play and Montessori philosophy

## Affiliate Disclosure

Participates in Amazon Associates (ID: cclaserdepi01-21). Commissions earned on qualifying purchases at no extra cost to users.

## Language

All content in Spanish (es-ES).
